title: Implement evaluation pipeline and golden file infrastructure
description: Create internal/eval/pipeline.go with Pipeline and Run() implementing full 12-step evaluation. Create config.go. Build golden file infrastructure in testdata/golden/: format parser, LoadCorpus, RunCorpus, seed ~30-40 entries. Pipeline integration tests: safe push, force push, reset hard, env escalation, allowlist/blocklist precedence, disabled packs, expansion cap.
